'''labowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podand|podand]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podand|podand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| labowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbeweth|læbeweth]] || [[word:læbewej|læbewej]] || [[word:læbewesh|læbewesh]] || [[word:læbewe|læbewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:labobowoth|labobowoth]] || [[word:labobowoj|labobowoj]] || [[word:labobowosh|labobowosh]] || [[word:labobowo|labobowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:labowoth|labowoth]] || [[word:labowoj|labowoj]] || [[word:labowosh|labowosh]] || [[word:labowo|labowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:labofwoth|labofwoth]] || [[word:labofwoj|labofwoj]] || [[word:labofwosh|labofwosh]] || [[word:labofwof|labofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labowotho|labowotho]] || [[word:labowojo|labowojo]] || [[word:labowosho|labowosho]] || [[word:labowoko|labowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labowoth|labowoth]] || [[word:labowoj|labowoj]] || [[word:labowosh|labowosh]] || [[word:labowo|labowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labowothol|labowothol]] || [[word:labowojol|labowojol]] || [[word:labowoshol|labowoshol]] || [[word:labowokol|labowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labowothotho|labowothotho]] || [[word:labowojojo|labowojojo]] || [[word:labowoshosho|labowoshosho]] || [[word:labowoko|labowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labowothon|labowothon]] || [[word:labowojon|labowojon]] || [[word:labowoshon|labowoshon]] || [[word:labowokon|labowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labowothoro|labowothoro]] || [[word:labowojoro|labowojoro]] || [[word:labowoshoro|labowoshoro]] || [[word:labowokoro|labowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
